holdings.infoBox: EQAL is an equity ETF with a total of 992 individual holdings. The top holdings are Iridium Communications stock at 0.96%, Cisco Systems at 0.74%, Lumentum Holdings at 0.69%, Ciena at 0.63%, and Millicom International Cellular at 0.62%.

overview.description: The Invesco Russell 1000 Equal Weight ETF (EQAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Equal Weight index. The fund tracks an index of the 1,000 largest US stocks. Each sector receives equal weight, and each stock within a sector receives equal weight. EQAL was launched on Dec 23, 2014 and is issued by Invesco.
